title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Atos India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
